lore.english:
Taimanin, Gosha Academy faculty. She lost her parents in a conflict before the establishment of Gosha Vilage, and went on missions, putting her life on the line to take care of her younger sister, Haruno. She has accumulated many achievements in battles starting from deceptive operations and sabotage to one-on-one spear combat and assassinations.

A sis-con beyond imagination. She'll do anything for her younger sister. The reason she left the field and is working as a battle instructor in Gosha is also because her sister asked her to.

Her ninja art, "Explosive Art", is an art that changes everything she touches into an explosive. Though it is bound by numerous constraints, depending on how it's used, it can employ a range of tactics beyond simple explosions. She's also a skillful user of the spear, so she has the nickname "Close Combat Specialist".

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Spear[-]
skills.description:
Using the character's abilities and spear, attacks the enemy a total of 3 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:390102]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:390102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:390102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Surprise Dust[-]
skills.description:
Throws a spear imbued with the character's abilities, attacking the enemy 1 time.
Inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:390302]%) [&Burn][-] to the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:390302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:390302] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] or more, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:390303]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]70%[-], reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:390304]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:390304]%[-] chance.
